creator: anesth@unixway.org.ua
text:
sK1 is an open source vector graphics editor similar to CorelDRAW,
Adobe Illustrator, or Freehand.

First of all sK1 is oriented for PostScript processing.

The major sK1 features:
* CMYK colorspace support
* CMYK support in Postscript
* Cairo-based engine
* Color managment
* Universal CDR importer (7-X3 versions)
* Modern Ttk based (former Tile widgets) user interface

WWW: http://www.sk1project.org

- anesth
anesth@unixway.org.ua
